description:
You are a production supervisor at an electronics contract manufacturer. Create a professional Bill of Materials (BOM) workbook at /home/ga/Documents/assembly_bom.xlsx using the component data from /home/ga/Documents/pcb_components.csv. The workbook must contain two sheets: 'BOM Detail' and 'Summary'.

The 'BOM Detail' sheet must include all data from the source CSV with an additional 'Extended_Cost' column containing formulas to calculate the product of Quantity and Unit_Cost_USD. Sort the rows by Category in ascending alphabetical order, bold the header row, and apply currency formatting to the Unit_Cost_USD and Extended_Cost columns.

The 'Summary' sheet must contain a table listing each unique Category with its calculated Total Quantity and Total Cost derived from the detail sheet. Below the category breakdown, include aggregate values for Grand Total Cost, Total Component Count (total number of line items), and Total Quantity. Apply bold formatting to the header row and currency formatting to all cost values.
